name: salon-question-at-booking-tool-doesnt-crash
description: Confused user at SALON_BOOKING_TOOL asks a question instead of answering — 'which booking tools do you support?'. Bot must NOT crash, NOT silently advance to native mode, NOT lose context. Acceptable behaviors: (a) re-ask the booking question naturally, (b) answer the question via side-channel and re-ask, or (c) treat as 'unclear' and re-prompt with the supported list. The key invariant: state stays SALON_BOOKING_TOOL and bot doesn't auto-pick a mode.

turns.user: which booking tools do you support?
